article.title: Fine-Tuning NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 with LoRA/DoRA for Robot Video Generation

harvestedTerms.summary: Hugging Face blog post detailing how to fine-tune NVIDIA's Cosmos Predict 2.5 world model using LoRA and DoRA adapters for robot video generation. Covers parameter-efficient fine-tuning, rectified flow loss, synthetic trajectory generation, and evaluation metrics including LLM-as-a-Judge.

article.title: Data Center Discontent, Understanding the Opposition, Fixing the Problem

harvestedTerms.summary: A paywalled Stratechery article by Ben Thompson arguing that local opposition to data centers is understandable and that the only viable fix is direct financial compensation to affected communities. The excerpt reveals the thesis but not the full analysis. Sidebar references mention 'Inference in the Agentic Future' and 'The Deployment Company' as adjacent topics, signalling infrastructure economics and agentic deployment as framing contexts.

article.title: Musk v. Altman proved that AI is led by the wrong people

harvestedTerms.summary: Opinion piece from The Verge arguing the Musk v. Altman trial revealed deep trustworthiness failures among AI's most powerful leaders, using trial testimony to raise questions about who controls AI development and why. The article uses AGI prominently as a motivating concept and touches on governance, safety culture, and the founding ideology of OpenAI.

mustReadFlagged.reason: A rare primary-source piece that uses sworn trial testimony — from Altman, Murati, Brockman, and others — to interrogate the trustworthiness of AI's most powerful figures. Less a news story than a structural argument about governance culture, and worth reading for anyone who wants to understand how AGI ideology and personal power dynamics have intertwined at the industry's apex.

article.title: Sighting: Glaucous-winged Gull, Brown Pelican, Snowy Egret, Canada Goose

harvestedTerms.summary: A personal birdwatching post by Simon Willison noting bird sightings during a morning walk at the LA River after PyCon US. No AI terminology or concepts are present in the substantive content of the article.

Anthropic acquires Stainless, a company specializing in SDK generation and MCP server tooling. The article frames the deal around agent connectivity — agents need reliable API access layers, and Stainless automates SDK generation across multiple languages from API specs. The acquisition extends Claude's developer platform capabilities and signals Anthropic's investment in the infrastructure layer beneath agents.
